chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.S- 450 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA 6973/2023. 2. For orders on MA 6974/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 20.10.2025. None have been present on behalf of the petitioner since the matter was instituted in this Court on 15.05.2023. This matter was taken up on 21.01.2025 then again on 20.08.2025 and thereafter on 24.04.2025 and once again today. No intimation is received. None are present on behalf of the petitioner. It appears that the petitioner has lost his interest in pursuing this petition which is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. JUDGE Tufail
